title: Rayact project configuration
description: Schema for rayact.config.json. Fields omitted fall back to built-in defaults; only set a field to override a default.

name.description: Cross-platform display name used by generated clients and dev-server discovery.

rayactAppKey.description: Stable app identifier. Also seeds the container-pack obfuscation key.

entry.description: Entry source file (e.g. src/App.tsx), relative to the project root.

platform.description: Deprecated. Use command flags such as --desktop, --android, --ios, or --web.

strictPort.description: Fail if devServer.port is already in use instead of picking the next free port.

package.description: Deprecated Android application id alias. Use packageName.

projectDir.description: Gradle project dir (contains gradlew), relative to project root.

activity.description: Optional fully qualified Android activity class. Defaults to the prebuilt Rayact host activity.

appName.description: Deprecated Android-only display name. Use top-level name.

packageName.description: Android application id used by prebuild, install, and launch.

bundleId.description: iOS product bundle identifier used by prebuild, install, and launch.

nativeModules.description: Installed native modules autolink automatically. Entries may disable or configure a package. Legacy name/lib/jsPackage objects are accepted with a warning through 0.0.x.

transform.description: Per-build-mode transforms. Defaults: dev=false, debug=false, release=true.

pack.description: Container (.rayactpack) packaging options for release/platform builds.

include.description: Extra (non-standard) file globs to opt into the pack, relative to the project root.

obfuscate.description: XOR-obfuscate pack entries with a key derived from rayactAppKey. Default false.

maxChunkSize.description: Max bytes per pack chunk before splitting. Default 104857600 (100 MB).
